# docs/ — Documentation & Papers

Supporting documentation, auto-generated references, and research papers for the Theory of Systems formalization.

---

## Auto-Generated References

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **FILE_MAP.md** | Every `.v` file with Qed count (auto-generated by `generate_docs.sh`) |
| **THEOREM_INDEX.md** | Index of key theorems across all modules |
| **CHANGELOG_v4.md** | Version history and changelog |

---

## Framework Documentation

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **ERR_FRAMEWORK.md** | Elements/Roles/Rules framework explanation |
| **Coq_Formalization_Summary_ERR.md** | Summary of the Coq formalization approach |
| **L5_LEFTMOST_DEDUCTION.md** | L5 (Law of Order) leftmost deduction strategy |

---

## Uncountability & Set Theory

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **DIAGONAL_VS_INTERVALS.md** | Comparison: diagonal argument vs shrinking intervals |
| **Uncountability_Without_Axiom_of_Infinity.md** | Constructive uncountability proof approach |
| **Nested_Rational_Intervals.md** | Nested interval technique for [0,1] non-surjectivity |
| **Nested_Rational_Intervals.pdf** | PDF version |
| **nested_intervals.pdf** | LaTeX-compiled paper |
| **nested_intervals.tex** | LaTeX source |

## Regenerating

```bash
# From repository root:
bash generate_docs.sh
```

This updates `FILE_MAP.md` and `THEOREM_INDEX.md` with current Qed counts.
